name: AscoBreastCancerGuidelineRecommendationR23UsePcr
title: Use pathologic complete response to guide decision-making
description: Ongoing assessment while the patient is receiving neoadjuvant therapy.

action.description: Use pathologic complete response, defined as absence of invasive disease in breast and lymph nodes, to guide clinical decision-making.

documentation.citation: Pathologic complete response should be used to guide clinical decision making after neoadjuvant therapy. Evidence: korde-et-al-2021-neoadjuvant-chemotherapy-endocrine-therapy-and-targeted-therapy-for-breast-cancer-asco-guideline_pdf: The Bottom Line, Recommendation 2.3
documentation.label: claim-r2-3

action.title: Use pathologic complete response to guide decision-making
